purpose: Force skills heartbeats to produce reviewed, installable, discoverable skill value instead of unbounded catalog/status churn.
selection_rule: Operators must consume the highest-priority ready ticket allowed by gates.md. High-risk package-facing review outranks manual discovery fallback; discovery restoration outranks routine metadata cleanup.
definition_of_done: A done ticket must restore discovery, review a source/skill, normalize a skill, remove a risk blocker, repair catalog parity, publish/verify an installable surface, or kill unsafe/generic material. Status-only updates are not done.

acceptance_result.evidence: latest.json absent; deterministic repair path and manual fallback queued without third-party content mirroring.
MCP/SSRF skill converted to high-risk requires_review defensive wrapper with unsafe default probing removed.
Catalog/install-manifest parity verified after MCP/SSRF risk review; no npm publish.
Four metadata-only public candidates recorded; no clone, execution, content copy, normalization, package, or publication.
Reviewed manual candidates; created source profiles/watch/risk/normalization queues only where justified.
OpenClaw limited to generic original runtime-surface safety patterns; operational account/browser/cron/gateway/channel/setup details blocked.
Original medium-risk requires_review AI SDK provider/tool safety skill created with attribution and no copied examples or implementation.
Catalog/install-manifest parity verified after AI SDK skill; skill_count 1183, software-engineering 147, medium 434.
Classified autonomy-loop and autoresearch-loop, stopped at browser-trace, opened Browser Trace risk review and catalog parity gate.
Browser Trace converted to high-risk requires_review read-only defensive debugging wrapper; package-facing browser launch/capture/query/API-key/session snippets removed.

acceptance_tests: catalog reflects Autonomy Loop and Autoresearch Loop as agent-operations medium requires_review skills
catalog reflects Browser Trace as software-engineering high requires_review
catalog summary counts are updated or verified after generation

acceptance_result.evidence: reports/catalog/2026-07-08-metadata-backfill-catalog-parity.md verifies dist/catalog.json and dist/catalog.md counts: skill_count 1183, agent-operations 108, software-engineering 148, high 16, medium 436, uncategorized 560, unspecified 722; install-manifest selection fields remain coherent; no npm/package/registry publication occurred.

tickets.supervisor_gate: Catalog parity after metadata backfill and Browser Trace risk review is verified. Package/publication endorsement remains blocked by absent discovery Action handoff, GitTaskBench license block, and remaining metadata backlog.
Promote only when Action logs or safe local/CI execution are inspectable.

tickets.mission: Process the next bounded batch from the uncategorized/unspecified-risk backlog, stopping immediately on any high-risk executable, credential, offensive, account, browser, SSRF, or external-mutation surface.
acceptance_tests: processes a bounded batch, not the entire catalog
stops and creates risk ticket on unsafe material
creates catalog refresh ticket after metadata changes

acceptance_result.evidence: Classified Code Complexity Scanner, Code Review, and Code Review Excellence; stopped at Diagnosing Bugs because it includes headless browser and captured-trace replay surfaces; opened a high-priority risk-review ticket and blocked catalog parity behind that review.

tickets.supervisor_gate: Metadata cleanup stopped before browser/headless trace material could pass through routine backfill. Catalog parity is blocked until Diagnosing Bugs risk review is complete.
tickets.kill_condition: Stop if the batch becomes generic metadata churn with no package-facing value or encounters unsafe material requiring review.

acceptance_tests: browser/headless automation, trace replay, fixture, bisection, fuzz, and HITL surfaces are classified
operational browser/session/trace-capture snippets are review-gated or removed if package-facing unsafe
catalog refresh remains blocked until review completes
tickets.supervisor_gate: High-risk package-facing browser/trace review outranks catalog parity and further metadata backlog cleanup.

acceptance_tests: catalog reflects Code Complexity Scanner as software-engineering low no-review
catalog reflects Code Review and Code Review Excellence as software-engineering medium requires_review
tickets.supervisor_gate: Blocked until Diagnosing Bugs risk review is complete because the batch stopped on browser/headless trace material.
